scripts.test:contracts: tsx src/lib/archive-query.contract.ts && tsx src/lib/artwork-query.contract.ts && tsx src/data/exhibition-contract.test.ts && tsx src/data/image-metadata.contract.ts && tsx src/lib/image-layout.contract.ts && tsx src/lib/weather-engine.contract.ts && tsx src/lib/weather-performance.contract.ts && tsx src/lib/weather-motion.contract.ts && tsx src/lib/atmospheric-particles.contract.ts && tsx src/lib/ui-redesign.contract.ts && tsx src/components/Season/SeasonalOverlay/seasonal-overlays.contract.ts && tsx src/lib/curation-path.contract.ts && tsx src/data/recipe-notes.contract.ts && tsx src/lib/validation-report.contract.ts
scripts.validate: npm run test:contracts && npm run audit:wide && npx tsc --noEmit --pretty false && npm run lint && npm run build
scripts.images:refresh: npm run images:scan9x16 && npm run images:import9x16 && npm run images:generate-imported-data && npm run images:scan
